# Vanilla script references to relocated production methods

**Auto-generated by tools/audit_pm_refs.ps1** — a catalogue of vanilla **events / journal entries /
scripted effects / triggers** that reference a *main* production method our tier split moved onto a
separate tier building. When such a check runs against the base building, the PM is no longer valid there,
so `is_production_method_active` (and similar) **errors and returns false** — the flavor/journal
content won't detect our tiered buildings. **No crashes; missed content.** See BUGS_AND_FIXES.md (2026-07-18).
Deduped by (PM, enclosing block): same PM in the same block across country/state copies = one row; the
same PM in a different block = a separate row.

**This is a living, deliberately-premature catalogue.** We will relocate *more* vanilla PMs as we add
tiers, so **re-run `tools/audit_pm_refs.ps1` after any tiering change or game patch** to refresh it.
**Convention:** when an in-game run surfaces a *new* log error of this class (a vanilla script referring
to a PM we relocated/removed), **append it here** (or add its PM to the split set + re-run) rather than
fixing it. Do NOT fix piecemeal — we batch one strategic pass later (lean: make our new tier
buildings eligible where advanced enough).
